title: Douglas Wheatley
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
[[File:Biggshobbie.jpg|thumb|250px|A panel of Wheatley's work from ''[[Star Wars: Empire: Darklighter]]''.]]

'''Douglas Wheatley''' is the artist for a large number of ''[[Star Wars]]'' Comics from series that include ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]'', [[Star Wars: Episode III — Revenge of the Sith (comic series)|the comic adaption of ''Revenge of the Sith'']], ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times]]'' as well as several one-shot comics such as ''[[The Bounty Hunters: Kenix Kil]]'' and ''[[Purge (comic book)|Star Wars: Purge]]''.
